guardrails.note: Read-only repair progress tracker. It compares the manual repair route with current evidence and stops before article edits, mark:review, or publish.
guardrails.stopBefore: Use this report to decide the next manual repair session. It does not make or approve article changes.

summary.nextRepairTitle: AI Agent 部署怎么做：用 Vercel AI SDK 理解工具调用、多步执行和上线检查

categories.detail: 10 source URL remediation action(s) still need human confirmation.
categories.nextAction: Open each failed source URL manually, replace dead URLs with accessible canonical sources, then rerun automation.
categories.proofRequired: Reviewer confirms final source URLs are canonical or replaced with accessible equivalents.

categories.detail: Source review evidence is ready, but human confirmation is still required before mark:review.
categories.nextAction: Human reviewer verifies fast-changing claims against the listed sources.
categories.proofRequired: Reviewer records source/fact-check confirmation and removes unsupported claims.

categories.nextAction: Adjust title, description, opening, heading, or body so the accepted query appears naturally.
categories.proofRequired: Primary query or accepted equivalent appears naturally in title, description, opening, and headings/body.

categories.detail: No current link to a published article.
categories.nextAction: Add one useful contextual link to a currently published relevant article.
categories.proofRequired: Draft contains at least one contextual link to a currently published relevant article.

categories.detail: Copydesk warning remediation still needs human acceptance or cleanup.
categories.nextAction: Resolve or explicitly accept the copydesk warning without weakening guardrails.
categories.proofRequired: Reviewer resolves or explicitly accepts copydesk warning without weakening guardrails.

categories.detail: Manual approval boundary is intact and publish confirmation is not included.
categories.nextAction: Do not run mark:review until explicit human approval per file.
categories.proofRequired: Draft remains status=draft, noindex=true, humanReviewRequired=true until explicit approval.
